creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-doc->freebsd-gnome

Looking at this, it appears that the code is in the dbus/hald/gdm rc.d scripts, 
but sounds like it doesn't work.  As a result, I think this is probably  
something that should be passed to theGNOME maintainers to investigate, rather 
than for the doc people to document...
